title: alyssum pulvinare
intro: Alyssum pulvinare, also known as sweet Alyssum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Alyssum pulvinare include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Alyssum pulvinare is often used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
